extra_descs.desc: Its a thick rope coiled into a fatal knot.  Feeling like suicide today?

long_desc: A bit of sinister-looking coiled rope is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a tiny thing, and brightly colored.  While showing you a fantasy swirl
of colors away from Mirror|rorriM Mud, here it shows you the real world.

long_desc: A kaleidoscope is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
It's thin and frayed at more than just the seams.  Since you have been
wearing this your whole life before entering your discipline, it may be time for
an improvement.

long_desc: A frayed golden tunic lies crumpled here.

extra_descs.desc: They are pitch black and merely a thin covering.

long_desc: A pair of black leggings has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: They are close to wearing holes at the toes and the heels.

long_desc: A pair of old leather boots are here.

extra_descs.desc:
This tiny dagger serves well for around town and the neighboring village.
The blade, however, is small and dull.

long_desc: A tiny black dagger has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The staff is carved from holly wood, and serves well for around town and the
neighboring village.  You might want to consider a stronger weapon as time goes
by, however.

long_desc: A thin gnarled staff has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
It is wrought from strong iron, but small and slightly rusty.  It serves well
for around town and the neighboring village, but as time goes by you might want
to consider trying something heavier.

long_desc: An iron mace is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The blade is dull, but it serves well for around town and the neighboring
village.

long_desc: A short sword is lying on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
Thirty tiny black candles shine with a golden glow.  At the base is an
engraving of one circle partially obscured by another.

long_desc: A candelabra glows dimly with a golden light.

extra_descs.desc:
The circular fountain is carved from black marble from the mines below the
town.  The water inside looks sweet to drink.

long_desc: A black marble fountain flows with a clear water.

extra_descs.desc:
This massive weapon takes much of your strength to carry.  It would like to
kill again, for the blood of the last victim has just dried on the blade.

long_desc: A bloody axe has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This is the treasury of Sundhaven.  It is, of course, guarded by a magical
protective shield against greedy intruders.

long_desc: A huge pile of gold is guarded by a magical force.

extra_descs.desc: It looks deliciously hot and spicy, a Maynards specialty!

long_desc: A quesadilla is here, hot and steaming.

extra_descs.desc:
The smells of brewing coffee coming from this rouse you from any numb-
mindedness and cause your mouth to water.

long_desc: A coffee brewer purcolates in the corner of the room.

extra_descs.desc: A dark stem crowned with golden petals, it smells of warm summer winds.

long_desc: A golden rose with leaves and stem of black is growing here.
short_desc: a golden rose with black leaves and stem

extra_descs.desc:
A clear glass is filled with ice, espresso, steamed milk and milk foam.  It
looks irresistable.

long_desc: A foamy iced cappuccino is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a tall glass of high-caffeine espresso, steamed milk, milk foam, and
irish cream.  Mmmm!

long_desc: A hot latte is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc: Who doesn't need one of these now and then?  How about very often?

long_desc: A black cup of coffee rests here.

extra_descs.desc:
It comes in a slightly ornamented porceline cup, and looks to be brewed
mostly of chamomile.

long_desc: A cup of hot tea is resting here.

extra_descs.desc: It comes in a tall pewter flask engraved with a black naga.

long_desc: The mascot brew of the assassins guild is resting here.

extra_descs.desc:
A black metal flask engraved with a coiled snake and filled with dark ale
that looks very inviting.

long_desc: A black metal flask is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc: The scent stings your nose pleasantly.

long_desc: A shot of whisky emits an alluring scent from the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
What does the assassins guild do with all those corpses left over from a
day's work?  Well, now you know.

long_desc: The specialty sandwich of the Nightbreak Cafe is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc:
You see a wide, black mug filled with liquid of a fiery color.  The side is
engraved with a roaring dragon.

long_desc: A large black mug rimming with flames sits here.
short_desc: a black mug filled with leaping flames

extra_descs.desc: It's a cold pewter mug, dented from being banged on tables repeatedly.

long_desc: The air is condensing on a cold mug of beer.
A keg of wine rests on the floor.

extra_descs.desc: The flask is gray and filled, or once filled, perhaps, with red wine.

long_desc: A flask of red wine has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc: Its a savory garlic rabbit roast.

long_desc: A tasty-looking roast is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
You see a small black cauldron of steaming meat stew.  The few scales
remaining tell you this was once a breathing dragon.  Despite its grisly
appearance, it smells delicious.

long_desc: A pot of delicious stew is steaming away.

extra_descs.desc: Its a round bread dotted with black rye.  It smells good to eat.

long_desc: A bread baked from rye is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc: You see a round tan-colored cake, still hot from the oven.

long_desc: A cake baked from wild saffron is resting at your feet.
short_desc: a cake baked from wild saffron

extra_descs.desc: Its sticky with sugar and looks delicious.  Hobbit specialty.

long_desc: A sticky black pastry is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc:
The plate is hot to the touch, and the mixture of noodles and vegetables look
spicy and delicious.

long_desc: A spicy dish of Thai food is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc: The hardy deer leather sack has straps to allow slinging over the shoulder.

long_desc: A strapped leather sack has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: Its a short, wooden torch.  It's um, flammable.

long_desc: A torch is lying on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: A slender dark feather rises from an ink pen.

long_desc: A black inky feather is lying nearby.
A piece of paper is fluttering in the wind.

extra_descs.desc: It's a small, dented lamp, forged from copper.

long_desc: A lamp glints copper in the faint light.

extra_descs.desc: You see a long, slender-tapered sword with a carved hilt of white quartz.

long_desc: A sword with a pale quartz hilt has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: It's a silver-colored dagger, with a crescent-like blade.

long_desc: A dagger with a blade curved like a crescent is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The barbed head of the mace is still hot from the forge, and crafted to look
like the rising spikes of flames.

long_desc: Still hot from the forge, a mace burns a black space on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
A slender staff, carved from ash and embedded with a cloudy crystal at the
head.

long_desc: A staff crowned with a cloudy crystal is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
Molded from local black cliff sandstone and laquered with a special varnish
for strength, this makes a sturdy shield.

long_desc: A dark sandstone plate is lying here.

extra_descs.desc: The guard's tunic is made of a sturdy, canvas-like material.

long_desc: A tunic of dark gold is crumpled here.

extra_descs.desc:
They are made from heavy black leather, and make a small clump-clump sound
when walking in them.

long_desc: A pair of sturdy black boots lie scattered on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
You see a silver sword with a straight, tapering blade, forged by the town
magicians from the cliff metal and winds for the guards that defend the city.

long_desc: A silver, straight-edge sword has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
Twenty-two marbles of red, purple and black comprise a set used commonly for
games such as 'Lick the dragon', 'Addiction' and 'Dodge the imp', popular among
human youths.  Set on the ground, the rolling marbles become slippery.

long_desc: Red, purple and black marbles are set up in a circular game.

extra_descs.desc:
The board and pieces are carved from black and light rose glass.  It's hard
to say who is winning, but the sacrifices are high.

long_desc: A black and rose glass chessboard is set up in mid-game.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a ribbon of soft dark velvet of finest quality..  Whoever's this is is
probably a rich merchant's daughter or the like.

long_desc: A dark velvet ribbon is coiled here.

extra_descs.desc:
Some poor fool tried to fight something ten times his strength, and was lucky
to get out with his life.  You see his dagger didn't make it.  The thin blade is
shattered to splinters.

long_desc: Something that used to be a dagger has been abandoned here.

extra_descs.desc: You think you can see a curse?  You sense its evil presence all around you.

long_desc: You sense something unlucky about this room.

extra_descs.desc:
A sturdy wooden platform rises above the black sand road, with plenty of room
around it for spectators.  On it are two means to death, the shackles for
beheading and the oak planking holding the noose for hanging.  The entire
surface is bespeckled with dried blood.

long_desc: The gallows platform rises ominously before you.

extra_descs.desc:
The circular fountain was etched from stone eons ago, and is worn and cracked
from the weather.  Thick moss grows along its inside walls, reflecting its poor
maintanance.

long_desc: A cracked stone fountain holds a supply of mossy-green water.

extra_descs.desc:
The altar is waist-high, with a stand of black oak and a top of dark amber.
There is a single black candle burning in a silver holder resting on it.

long_desc: An altar of dark amber stands here.

extra_descs.desc: It is wide and sharp, the blade's edge stained a dark red.

long_desc: A large meat cleaver is stuck in the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
You see a hunk of amber stone in excellent condition, and possibly worth a
little gold.

long_desc: An amber stone glints dully in the light.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a beautiful amethyst in excellent condition, and possibly worth some
gold.

long_desc: An amethyst of pure violet glints from the ground.

extra_descs.desc: You see a tiny diamond in excellent condition, and likely worth some gold.

long_desc: A small diamond twinkles from the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The golden sunstone is very pretty to look at, but is probably worth more
than the hand that carries it.

long_desc: A golden sunstone shines with a celestial glow.

extra_descs.desc:
Small but delightful to the eye.  Golden and brown bands shimmer from the
stones as the necklace is turned in the light.

long_desc: A gold and brown necklace lies on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: The agate is an opaque black and set in a ring of silver.

long_desc: A black agate ring lies half-buried on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: It's a pointed shard of obsidian flecked with white cloud-like patterns.

long_desc: A black, white-flecked shard is lying here.

extra_descs.desc: The silvery chain mail looks sturdy and close-fitting.

long_desc: A heap of chain mail is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The helm is small and brightly silver-colored.  Fitting snugly on the head,
it impairs your hearing slightly, but the protection seems a worthwhile
sacrifice.

long_desc: A bright helm has been left nearby.

extra_descs.desc: They extend from elbow to wrist, and are forged from bright silver.

long_desc: A pair of silver bracers is here.

extra_descs.desc:
The knee-height black boots are fashioned with a razor-sharp point at each
toe, delivering a more wicked kick, and kind of a nice tapdance, in fact.

long_desc: A pair of boots with razor-sharp toes is sitting here.

extra_descs.desc:
It's a large, thin shield fashioned of the scales of an old creature you
don't recognize.  You wonder if the maker did.

long_desc: A shield of the scales of an unknown creature is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
It seems to be stiched together from some kind of small animal hide, probably
something plentiful..  Mouse?  Rat?  Mole?  The water looks safe, however.

long_desc: A waterskin has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The black naga-hide chair eases back by the use of a lever on the side, and
looks luxuriously comfortable.  Perfect for hanging out on, waiting for the
bounty hunters to give up.  (Theoretically.  )

long_desc: A black lounger chair looks very relaxing.

extra_descs.desc:
You flip through it.  It appears to contain various recipes for poisons..
From minor irritations to fatal, soul-stealing tinctures....  Yet, most of the
scrawlings are spattered with blood and blurred with time.  Only in Exile would
these components be useful - you are doubtful you could find such ingrediants
here.

long_desc: A magazine is lying open on the floor.

extra_descs.desc:
The silvery sword is slender and light, suitable for fencing manuevers.  The
hilt is gilded with the purest gold from the treasury of nobility.

long_desc: A beautiful gilded sword lies at your feet.

extra_descs.desc:
It is crafted to fit a long, slender type of sword, perhaps a foil.  The
edges are faintly gilded in gold, and one side engraved with the seal of a noble
house.

long_desc: A scabbard of bright silver lies on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
It is rather crudely made, it must be acknowledged.  The use of stone in
weaponry has fallen out of fashion, since the weight allows only the clumsier
manuevers.

long_desc: A short sword with a hilt of finished stone has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
A neat type in black stencil gives the warning, "No Guaranteed Satisfaction.
"

long_desc: A notice is posted on the wall.

extra_descs.desc: The meat is thick and juicy, still red with the blood of the beast.

long_desc: A leg of mutton is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
A human delicacy.  And well worth its reputation for inspiring courage...
Or at least gall.

long_desc: A heart is lying in a pool of blood.

extra_descs.desc:
Cruelly harvested from the backs of young dragons, the leathery wings are
tasty, and diaphanous as strands of silk or rain.

long_desc: A bowl of tasty dragon wings is resting here.
short_desc: a bowl of little dragon wings

extra_descs.desc:
Fingers and ribs grilled to a saucy roast poke out from between two slices of
coarse rye bread.

long_desc: A hot sandwich with a putrid odor is here.

extra_descs.desc:
On the handle the words are engraved, "City of the Cliffs, gates freed, No
trust guaranteed"

long_desc: A key fashioned of black and gold metal is lying in the dust.

extra_descs.desc:
The small corn husk doll is stitched with irregular, uneven lines, giving it
an eerie appearance.  A shiver runs through you as you realize it is slightly
warm to the touch.

long_desc: A corn straw doll is lying in the dust.

extra_descs.desc: A long lock of straight red hair is coiled round your fingers.

long_desc: A lock of red hair is lying coiled on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The sword is beautifully crafted in order to serve the elite members of the
Black Watch of Sundhaven, charged with the work of keeping the town clean from
ill-meaning rogues and killers.

long_desc: A beautiful black sword emblazoned with a triskelion lies here.
short_desc: a sword of the Black Watch

extra_descs.desc:
The hilt of the short iron blade is still warm from the hand of the elite
guardsman to whom it once belonged.

long_desc: A short iron blade has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The breast plate seems to be forged from some sort of black iron, and is
quite sturdy.

long_desc: A black breast plate is lying face up.

extra_descs.desc:
The flowing knee length cloak is fashioned from wool and chased in gold
corded thread.

long_desc: A handsome black and gold cloak is folded on the ground.
short_desc: a handsome black and gold cloak

extra_descs.desc:
_______
   |     |-
   |.....| \        The warrior's drink of choice.
   |     | /
   |     |-                Okay, one of them.
   -------
  It appears the Lord of the Watch favored this one very much,
since it is empty.

long_desc: A tall glass of scotch is sitting nearby.

extra_descs.desc: The patched skirt is a sturdy cross-stitching of bright red and violet.

long_desc: A patchwork of red and purple lies on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The gypsy blouse is of a rugged muslin fabric, rough and somewhat dirty, but
in decent shape.

long_desc: A dark red blouse is crumpled here.

extra_descs.desc:
The instrument seems to have seen some rough times.  The gypsies range far
and wide...  However, it still holds together enough to play a tune, even block
a blow or two.

long_desc: An old violin has been tossed in the dust.

extra_descs.desc:
The mushroom is short with a wide, pale-spotted umbrella.  It emits a toxic
fume.

long_desc: A mushroom with white spots is growing in the water.

extra_descs.desc:
The large wine-red flower emits a delightful smell, and is rumored to be
excellent for tea, and some other more toxic uses.

long_desc: A lovely red hibiscus flower is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
All life has left the eye that stares blankly into space.  However, toad's
eyes are rumored to be excellent in the manufacture of toxic substances.

long_desc: A small slimy eye stares up at you from the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
A bowl-shaped mortar carved from black marble holds a small blunt pestle.
It looks like the perfect container to mash up something toxic in.

long_desc: A mortar and pestle of black marble sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
The tunic is frayed and layered with the dust of the road from many leagues
of travel.

long_desc: A dusty pile of red canvas is here.

extra_descs.desc:
A thin, worn cloth of blue drapes over a polished wooden tray.  Though
covered with the dust of winding roads, several goods of exotic make are lain
out that appeal.

long_desc: A tray of goodies sits invitingly on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The pipe is cracked with age and filled with tobacco half-smoked into
charcoal.

long_desc: An old wooden pipe sits in the dust.

extra_descs.desc: A slim dark taper rises from a circular brass holder.

long_desc: A black candlestick glows with a dim light.

extra_descs.desc:
A small glowing ember shows atop a stick of a grainy substance.  It smells of
some strong herbs grown beyond the lands you have known.

long_desc: A plume of smoke drifts from an incense stick in the room.

extra_descs.desc:
The small, blue and brown ornamented jar is cracked slightly and dripping
with a sticky golden substance.

long_desc: Flies are buzzing round a honey jar on the ground.
